description_long: This is a plush, single-seat recliner upholstered in a muted blue fabric, featuring broad, rolled armrests adorned with a row of metallic nailhead trim along the front edges. The seat cushion is thick and well-padded, providing ample comfort, while the backrest is tall and slightly angled for ergonomic support. The recliner stands on four short, tapered wooden legs finished in a dark color, giving it a sturdy base. The overall silhouette is boxy yet inviting, with smooth, continuous surfaces and minimal visible seams. The armrests and backrest are generously padded, contributing to a soft and welcoming appearance. No visible levers, buttons, or reclining mechanisms are apparent from any angle.
description: A plush blue recliner with rolled, nailhead-trimmed armrests, thick cushioning, and dark tapered legs. The design is soft, boxy, and inviting, with no visible reclining mechanism.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, tall backrest, and both rolled armrests with nailhead trim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick armrest, angled backrest, and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the broad, padded rear profile with no visible seams or mechanisms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, backrest angle, and seat depth.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rolled, and heavily padded, featuring a row of metallic nailhead trim along the front edge for decorative detail.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single, continuous padded piece with no visible segmentation or separate headrest.
